economic_notes: Nation has 10% investment in Amik-BBF HydroKap LP and Amik-CTR HydroKap LP (20,000 units each, cost base nil). 33% investment in 2454357 Ontario Inc. (100 of 300 shares, cost base nil). 33% investment in Three Nations Drilling LP through 2454357 Ontario Inc. Resources revenue of $3,047,064 and COFN TLE trust distributions of $576,082 indicate active resource and land entitlement activities.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED because the First Nation did not consolidate the Chapleau Ojibwe First Nation Treaty Land Entitlement Trust (created 2017), which should be consolidated under Canadian public sector accounting standards as it is controlled by the First Nation. The prior year 2020 opinion was also modified for the same reason. Comparatives are restated (see Note 16, not fully visible in provided pages). current_liabilities calculated as demand loans $183,016 + accounts payable $103,834 + current portion of long-term debt $9,305 + deferred revenue current portion estimated; deferred revenue $867,849 shown separately. Total government transfers include ISC $1,881,215 + Wabun Tribal Council $500,428 + Nishnawbe-Aski Nation $131,772 + Province of Ontario $88,549 + OFNLP $458,279 (treated as government transfer) = $3,060,243 approximately. OSR includes Resources, COFN TLE distributions, interest, rental and trust earnings.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
